Title: Babylon
Actors: Brad Pitt, Margot Robbie, Jean Smart
Plot: A tale of outsized ambition and outrageous excess, it traces the rise and fall of multiple characters during an era of unbridled decadence and depravity in early Hollywood.
Language: English, Spanish, Italian, Cantonese, French, Hungarian, German
Awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 45 wins & 158 nominations total
